name: agentcanary
description: Market context layer for autonomous AI agents. Fresh regime, risk, narrative & scenario state via REST + MCP, with transparent source trails.

AC_API_KEY.description: Your AgentCanary API key (get one at https://app.agentcanary.ai)

tools.name: get_indicators
tools.description: 36 market indicators (Bull Market Support Band, Pi Cycle, Wyckoff, Stablecoin Composite, Composite Risk Score + 31 more). Pass name= for one indicator, category= to filter.

tools.name: get_narratives
tools.description: Narrative momentum scores (AI, energy, defense, crypto)

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Aggregated market news, filterable by ticker

tools.name: get_signals
tools.description: Trading signals — pass type= for one of 20 sub-types: whale-alerts, fear-greed, funding-rates, btc-etf-flows, vix, credit-stress, sector-rotation, insider-activity, correlations, dxy, oil, yield-curve, market-structure, stablecoin-dominance, whale-positions, cftc-cot, bofa-fms, dispersion, geopolitical-risk, decision-engine (default)

tools.name: get_market_structure
tools.description: Market structure & exchange data — pass view= for one of: orderbook (depth across exchanges, default), liquidation-heatmap (BTC leverage liquidation map), liquidation-ranges, exchange-assets (token listings by venue), exchange-volumes, coinbase. Covers leverage/depth/venue data complementing directional signals from get_signals.

tools.name: get_defi
tools.description: DeFi intelligence — pass category= for one of: yields, pe-ratios, stablecoins, chains, unlocks, perps, signals, intelligence (default)

tools.name: get_btc_options
tools.description: BTC options — pass view= for maxpain (max pain price) or skew (volatility skew). Omit for overview (max pain + skew + put/call ratios). Key for institutional positioning.

tools.name: get_central_banks
tools.description: Central bank data — pass view= for one of: balance-sheets, gold, btc, stablecoins, reserves, tic. Omit for overview

tools.name: get_expectations
tools.description: Market expectations — pass view= for one of: crowded, early, rotation. Omit for overview

tools.name: get_macro
tools.description: Macro data — pass view= for one of: snapshot (30+ FRED series), business-cycle, global-liquidity, us-m2, supply-chain, calendar-high-impact (high-impact economic events), risk-score, signals. Omit for regime

tools.name: get_open_interest
tools.description: Cross-exchange open-interest snapshot for crypto perps — aggregate OI across 43 symbols + top-N by USD size + top-N by absolute 4h Δ% (intraday OI shifters). Pass view= for one of: top, shifters. Omit for full snapshot. Builder tier+.

tools.name: get_liquidations
tools.description: Crypto perp liquidations. 24h total + latest-4h breakdown with long/short USD split, per-side event counts, long%/short%, and dominant-direction label. Builder tier+.

pricing.payment: USDC/USDT on Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Ethereum
